Name: Sticky note
Text Area 1:
NOTES:
All Primary Keys with identifying relationships will be defined as a surrogate key in the schema.
e.g. CONSTRAINT section_pk PRIMARY KEY (TERM_SEM, TERM_YEAR, CRS_SUBJ, CRS_NUM)

CONSTRAINTS:
PROF_ID and STUDENT_ID cannot contain special  characters and is strictly alphanumeric.
TERM_SEM - TEXT (ENUM) ['Winter' = 10, 'Spring' = 30, 'Summer' = 40, 'Fall' = 50].
PROG_LAB_SUBMIT and PROG_FINAL_SUBMIT will give back a link of the submission file
PROG_FINAL_SUBMIT will automatically get updated to the file that was last submitted before a due date.
PROG_ATTENDANCE - TEXT (ENUM) ['Present', 'Absent', 'Late', 'Excused']
PROG_DUE_DATE  is an FK from LAB_SESSION SES_DUE_DATES.
Dates with CURR_DATE are default values. Whenever they are created, they automatically get the current date.
There's other constraints... but they're pretty straight forward for the rest; mostly just ranges.
